creator: matthew@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm getting configure failures when test building:
```
configure: error: Cannot find MySQL header files under /usr/local
===>  Script "configure" failed unexpectedly.
Please report the problem to freebsd-ports@dan.me.uk [maintainer] and attach
the "/wrkdirs/usr/ports/net/rtg/work/rtg-0.7.4/config.log" including the
output of the failure of your make command. Also, it might be a good idea to
provide an overview of all packages installed on your system (e.g. a
/usr/local/sbin/pkg-static info -g -Ea).
*** Error code 1

Stop.
```

I'm seeing this building with 10.1 amd64 and 10.1 i386.  9.3 builds fail because lang/php56 fails to compile.
